title: althaea muricata
intro: Althaea muricata, also known as the rough marsh mallow or prickly mallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and soothing effects due to its high mucilage content. The health benefits of Althaea muricata include soothing irritated mucous membranes, reducing inflammation and pain, and aiding in wound healing. Althaea muricata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
